title: MACE+
description: The best Mace PVP modpack by far!
body:
### Various mods and resource packs to help improve your Mace PvP experience!
Includes peformance mods, ping optimization, PVP overlays, texture packs, pre-added PVP servers, useful HUDs, opponent info, a singleplayer mace practice map, and niche mods that only the best PvPers know of.

Configure mods in mod menu, make use of various resource packs, and tweak everything to your personal preference! 

_Highly recommended by our Tier 3 beta testers!_
________________________________________________________________________________

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45ccfcf4a556bd4f28bf58d2ccd0119032f8a389_0.webp)

_______________________________________________________________________________________________

## Includes totls Mace practice map by Tottles 
### _(use with the totls resource pack)_


<details>
<summary>Showcase Video</summary>


<iframe width="140" height="78.5" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/AsxBu0bC29o" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="3" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

_______________________________________________________________________________________________

Plenty of configurable utility mods and resource packs to choose from. Whether or not you are a beginner or an experienced player, this modpack will be your best choice for Mace PVP!

**Created by salmonshot ♡**


_______________________________________________________________________________________________

# NOTICE‼️

Some of the mods in this modpack are disallowed in the MCTiers Mace PVP ranked ruleset, meaning if you plan on tiertesting, you must disable said mods via the Modrinth launcher or in the in-game Mod Menu.
Also be careful when playing on SMPs, check their rules to see if they have a disallowed mods list.


<details>
<summary>More Info</summary>

![Join the MCTiers Mace PVP Discord server if you are unsure about anything (https://discord.gg/mctiers)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ca0d9dc7a12903cdcb671c8e6127286a84b479f.png)
[Join the MCTiers Mace PVP Discord Server if you are unsure about anything](https://discord.gg/mctiers)

Main disallowed mods in this modpack:
- Freelook
- Health Indicators
- Shield Status+

</details>
